india_trends.title: Indian private sector output growth accelerates in April as manufacturing grows faster: HSBC Flash India PMI
india_trends.summary: April saw a rebound in India's private sector growth. The HSBC Flash PMI revealed stronger manufacturing output and job creation, although inflation pressures remained high, with firms raising selling prices in response.

india_trends.summary: The sell-off comes despite a broadly positive reception from analysts

india_trends.title: Iran war, oil shock fail to dent India’s private sector growth as April PMI rises
india_trends.summary: Indian businesses saw activity PMI grow in April. Manufacturing and services rebounded strongly. This happened even with rising costs from the Middle East conflict. Domestic demand remains robust. Companies are building stocks for future uncertainties. Employment is also increasing. This shows resil

india_trends.title: Havells India shares drop 6.5% after Q4 show, brokerages flag demand concerns despite profit growth
india_trends.summary: The company’s revenue from operations increased just 2.47 per cent year-on-year to ₹6,705.20 crore, highlighting sluggish demand conditions across key segments

india_trends.title: Bitcoin inches toward $80K on $1.5 billion ETF inflows, short squeeze adds momentum
india_trends.summary: Bitcoin is inching towards the $80,000 mark. Strong inflows into Bitcoin ETFs are supporting this rise. india_trends.title: Maruti Suzuki hits all-time high production of 23.4 lakh units in FY26
india_trends.summary: Maruti Suzuki India Ltd achieved a record production of 23.4 lakh units in FY26. This makes it the sole passenger vehicle maker in India to reach this significant milestone. The company also stands as the only Suzuki Motor Corporation facility globally to attain such production levels.

india_trends.title: Rupee breaks 94 as oil surge deepens sentiment hit from RBI FX curb relaxation
india_trends.summary: The Indian rupee weakened significantly against the US dollar on Thursday due to rising oil prices. The currency touched its lowest point in over three weeks. The Reserve Bank of India likely intervened to support the rupee. Global markets are also concerned about oil supply disruptions. This situat

india_trends.title: AI pure-play Fractal Analytics crosses IPO mark first time since listing amid slipping retail ownership. What's the outlook?
india_trends.summary: Fractal Analytics crossed its IPO price for the first time since listing as the stock rallied 8% in two sessions, even as retail ownership slipped in Q4. Experts say the AI theme remains strong but caution that sustained gains depend on the stock holding key support levels amid lingering weak sentim

india_trends.title: Is gold still a strategic asset for portfolios?
india_trends.summary: The World Gold Council highlights gold's role as a crucial strategic asset amid rising volatility, driven by macroeconomic influences and geopolitical tensions. Despite occasional price fluctuations, gold typically stabilizes over time, serving as a low-risk investment.

india_trends.title: Mint Explainer | Is India's wheat export push a good idea?
india_trends.summary: India has reopened wheat exports amid a record surplus to ease excess supply and support farm prices. By offloading stocks, it aims to boost farmer incomes without stoking inflation, as ample buffer reserves and policy flexibility help keep domestic supply stable.

india_trends.title: Defence, power themes attract interest, but challenges persist: Anand Tandon
india_trends.summary: Equity markets have seen a rapid recovery, surprising many investors. Despite this rebound, concerns about high valuations and unresolved geopolitical tensions persist. Experts advise caution as the market reaches pre-tension levels without these issues being sorted.

india_trends.title: RIL Q4 preview: Weak O2C may dent earnings; Jio, retail to provide support
india_trends.summary: Reliance Industries is poised for a mixed financial quarter. Revenue is expected to grow steadily, driven by its telecom and retail businesses. However, profitability may face pressure from its O2C and upstream segments. Brokerage estimates project a varied net profit range. Reliance will announce i

india_trends.title: Vedanta share price falls over 3%. Should you buy the stock ahead of the demerger record date?
india_trends.summary: Vedanta demerger record date for determining the eligible shareholders to receive shares in the newly carved-out businesses is May 1, 2026. The company’s board of directors have also fixed May 1 as the demerger effective date.

india_trends.title: From AI to subsidies: Bernstein’s candid open letter to PM Modi flags 8 critical fault lines
india_trends.summary: Global brokerage Bernstein has cautioned India against becoming a mere user of future technology. The firm suggests that continued reliance on subsidies and delayed reforms could lead to low productivity. Bernstein outlines eight critical themes, including AI, agriculture, energy, and manufacturing,

india_trends.title: Petrol, diesel prices to rise Rs 25–28 per litre? Petroleum ministry clarifies
india_trends.summary: Government has firmly denied any plans to raise petrol and diesel prices, calling such reports mischievous and misleading. Officials emphasized that India is unique in not seeing fuel price hikes over the past four years. Efforts are ongoing to shield citizens from global price volatility, especiall

india_trends.title: Nifty 50 down 7% year-to-date: Should investors be worried about the second-order impact of the US-Iran war?
india_trends.summary: The Nifty 50 index has declined 7% so far this year. Experts warn that while initial impacts of the US-Iran war are manageable, prolonged tensions may trigger significant second-order effects on inflation and corporate earnings.

india_trends.title: “Only 30% investors trade”: Nithin Kamath reveals the shocking truth about India’s F&O market
india_trends.summary: Nithin Kamath reveals India's derivatives market, perceived as booming, is actually small with limited retail participation. Only 30% of 13 crore investors engage in trading, and 60-70% of F&amp;O turnover comes from just 1-2% of traders, indicating concentrated activity and risks.

india_trends.title: US Stock Market | From Fear to Rally: What’s driving the US market’s surprising surge
india_trends.summary: Indian investors can note the US stock market's surprising rise. Strong company earnings are powering this rally, overshadowing worries about oil prices and global tensions. Major stock indexes are hitting new highs. This trend suggests corporate performance is currently more influential than public
